PROP-01b-partial2-inv-004.text: Solution _multiCall must not approve contract tokens to addresses other than the auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-004.assertion: forall _call in auctionCallback._multiCall: if target is ERC20 and data encodes approve(spender, amt) then spender == s_auction

locations.note: no validation of spender in approve calls within _multiCall
arbitrary calldata dispatched; no ERC20 approve spender restriction
